name: Smart Warehouse Management System
description: An AI-powered system for a 500,000 sq ft logistics hub. Must integrate with RFID gait sensors, optimize 3D shelf space using genetic algorithms, and coordinate a fleet of 50 stock-counting drones via ROS2. Key KPI: Real-time inventory accuracy > 99.9%.

name: Tele-Health Post-Op Recovery Platform
description: Remote monitoring for cardiac surgery patients. Integrates with wearable ECG/Pulse-Ox via Bluetooth LE. Features AI wound analysis (computer vision) for early infection detection and HL7 FHIR integration with hospital EMRs. Data must be HIPAA compliant.

name: Autonomous Urban Delivery Robot Control
description: Fleet management for 200 sidewalk robots. Requirements include LiDAR-based obstacle avoidance (SLM), mesh network communication (5G/V2X), and a 100ms latency remote takeover interface for human operators. Must handle adverse weather navigation.

name: Decentralized Carbon Credit Marketplace
description: Ethereum-based L2 platform for tokenized carbon credits. Requires Solidity smart contracts for verifiable sequestration auditing, Oracle integration for satellite biomass data, and a Liquidity Pool for spot-price trading.

name: AI-Driven Smart Grid Stabilizer
description: Real-time balancing for a city-scale microgrid. Must process 10,000 sensor pulses/sec, predict solar/wind fluctuations using LSTM networks, and perform automated load-shedding during peak demand to maintain 60Hz frequency stability.

name: Multi-Tenant SaaS HR Payroll Engine
description: Payroll for global firms (100+ countries). Must handle complex tax logic (GDPR/SOC2 compliant), support 50+ currencies with real-time XE integration, and provide an automated audit trail for government compliance reporting.

name: Edge-Computing Traffic Control System
description: Hardware-software system for intelligent intersections. Uses edge-AI (NVIDIA Jetson) for vehicle classification, V2X emergency vehicle pre-emption, and dynamic signal phase optimization to reduce CO2 emissions by 15%.

name: Personalized Oncology Treatment Portal
description: Decision support for oncologists. Matches patient genomic profiles (VCF files) against a database of 5,000+ active clinical trials using NLP. Must provide evidence-based treatment ranking with confidence scores.

name: Zero-Trust Enterprise Identity Manager
description: Security layer for hybrid-cloud infrastructure. Enforces FIDO2 biometrics, micro-segmentation using eBPF, and continuous risk scoring based on user behavioral analytics (typing cadence, IP geo-drift).

name: High-Frequency Algorithmic Trading Core
description: Execution engine for NYSE/NASDAQ. Requirements: < 50-microsecond tick-to-trade latency, FPGA-accelerated order parsing, and circuit-breaker logic for multi-million dollar basket trades. Uses 10Gbps Solarflare networking.

name: Predictive Industrial Equipment Maintenance
description: Digital twin for hydro-electric turbines. Uses 128-channel vibration analysis (FFT), thermal imaging integration, and predictive failure modeling to increase Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF) by 25%.

name: Shared Electric Scooter Fleet Service
description: Real-time mobility platform for 10,000 vehicles. Features remote battery monitoring, geo-fencing (speed limiting in parks), and an automated billing engine using Stripe. Requires 99.99% uptime for the mobile API.

name: Collaborative Architectural VR Design Room
description: Multi-user engine for BIM-integrated design. Supports 32 concurrent VR users, physics-accurate Ray Tracing (RTX), and real-time syncing of Revit/Rhino models with <20ms motion-to-photon latency.

name: Smart Irrigation for Sustainable Arid Farming
description: Closed-loop agricultural system. Integrates LoRaWAN soil sensors with satellite moisture mapping and weather APIs to optimize water delivery per-quadrant, reducing usage by 40%.

name: Elderly Fall Detection and Response Hub
description: Privacy-first vision system for assisted living. Uses skeletal tracking (PoseNet) on local edge nodes to detect falls without streaming raw video. Alerts emergency services via Twilio and provides health logs.

name: Cross-Platform AR Retail Fitting Room
description: Virtual try-on for e-commerce. Uses 3D body mesh scanning, cloth physics simulation (Unity/Unreal), and AI-driven style recommendations based on purchase history. Must work on iOS/Android ARKit/ARCore.

name: Micro-Service API Security Gateway
description: L7 traffic manager for 1,000+ services. Features mTLS termination, dynamic rate-limiting via Redis, and real-time anomaly detection for SQL injection and credential stuffing attacks.

name: Intelligent Public Transit Route Optimizer
description: Dynamic city-wide bus dispatching. Uses real-time passenger demand heatmaps from mobile sensors to reroute 'on-demand' shuttles and optimize fixed bus lines for fuel efficiency.

name: Digital Twin for Subsea Oil Pipeline
description: Structural health monitoring for underwater infrastructure. Integrates acoustic sensor arrays with CFD (Computational Fluid Dynamics) models to predict corrosion and detect pinhole leaks at 2,000m depth.

name: E-Learning Adaptive Content Engine
description: K-12 personalized learning platform. Uses IRT (Item Response Theory) to calibrate question difficulty, assesses student gaze/engagement via webcam, and generates dynamic curriculum paths for 1M+ active users.
